summary: RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) with AWS Cognito Groups tested successfully. All 19 backend API tests passed. Frontend login routing verified - Family tab routes to /family, Operator tab routes to /operator. JWT tokens contain cognito:groups claim. Role sync from Cognito groups working (highest priority: admin > operator > caregiver > guardian > user).

minor.issue: roles array returns only synced DB role [admin], not full Cognito groups [guardian, admin]. Frontend compensates by extracting cognito:groups directly from JWT.

GET /api/auth/me.returns_user_info: PASS - id, email, role, roles, facility_id, cognito_sub

Registration.default_guardian_role: PASS - New users get guardian role

critical_code_review_comments: RBAC middleware in rbac.py correctly checks both cognito:groups from JWT AND local DB role
Role hierarchy correctly implemented: admin(5) > operator(4) > caregiver(3) > guardian(2) > user(1)
Login.jsx correctly routes Family tab to /family and Operator tab to /operator based on login handler (not role)
AuthContext.jsx correctly extracts cognito:groups from JWT and stores in user.roles array
facility_id column exists in User model but is null for all users (placeholder for future multi-tenancy)
POTENTIAL ENHANCEMENT: /api/auth/me could return full Cognito groups instead of just DB role for roles array
seed_data_creation: No manual seed. One test user created with TEST_ prefix during registration test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: RBAC fully working. 5 Cognito groups: admin, guardian, operator, caregiver, user. Users assigned to groups in AWS Cognito. JWT contains cognito:groups claim. Role sync on login picks highest priority. require_role() middleware checks both JWT groups and DB role. Escape Layer endpoints (voice-trigger, fake-call, sos) require ['guardian', 'operator', 'admin']. Guardian AI requires same. Safety Brain V2 requires ['guardian', 'operator', 'caregiver', 'admin']. facility_id is null placeholder.

verified_features.login_returns_cognito_groups_in_jwt: Working - JWT payload contains cognito:groups array
verified_features.role_sync_highest_priority: Working - admin > operator > caregiver > guardian > user
